assertions.reason: Scoped vitest run confirms placeOrder returns txHash and calls waitForTransaction, but tests are fully mocked (vi.mock on @aptos-labs/ts-sdk), so live on-chain confirmation of the returned hash is not observable in this surface.
Vitest output shows cancelOrder payload/txHash behavior passes, but there is no non-mocked on-chain book verification after cancellation; assertion requires proving order absence in on-chain state.
Deposit/withdraw vitest checks pass for transaction construction and txHash return, but tests do not verify real on-chain balance deltas (all Aptos calls are mocked).
getOrderbook vitest tests passed, verifying typed bid/ask arrays with price, quantity, and cumulative total depth plus same-price aggregation behavior.
getBalances vitest tests passed, verifying available/locked CASH and USDC values are returned as typed human-readable balance fields.

blockers.description: Assigned SDK tests are unit-level with mocked @aptos-labs/ts-sdk calls, which prevents proving live on-chain confirmation/state outcomes required by VAL-BACKEND-001/002/003.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Ran assertion-focused and full-suite vitest commands and inspected test mock structure evidence; no integration/live-chain assertions exist in current SDK test surface.
